## Checklist

- [ ] `python test_server.py` passes locally
- [ ] `black --check --line-length 100 .` passes
- [ ] If a tool was added/removed: updated the tool count in `test_server.py`
      and the tool tables in `README.md` / `docs/tools.md`
- [ ] Updated docs where relevant
